nasb.text: Be silent, you inhabitants of the coastland, You merchants of Sidon; Your messengers crossed the sea

esv.text: Be still, O inhabitants of the coast; the merchants of Sidon, who cross the sea, have filled you.

cnv.text: 沿海的居民， 就是靠航海致富的西頓商人哪！ 要靜默無言。

ccb.text: 海边的居民，西顿的商贾啊， 要静默无言。 你们的商人飘洋过海，

csbs.text: 沿海的居民哪，静默吧！ 越海的西顿商人曾使你富足；
